prompts.text: The school principal banned the mascot after it kept yelling, "_____!"
A polite dragon's favorite snack is _____.
The worst thing to find inside a birthday pinata is _____.
Name the least helpful superhero power.
The moon is actually made of _____, according to one very confident uncle.
What would a penguin bring to a fancy dinner?
A new alarm clock wakes you up by whispering _____.
The world's slowest race is sponsored by _____.
The secret ingredient in grandma's award-winning soup is _____.
What is the worst name for a roller coaster?
The treasure map led straight to _____.
A robot trying to blend in at summer camp would say _____.
The museum's newest exhibit is just a glass case full of _____.
What did the pirate name their pet hamster?
The town parade was delayed because everyone was arguing about _____.
The first rule of the blanket fort is _____.
A wizard's spell went wrong and turned every chair into _____.
What is a terrible slogan for a sandwich shop?
The new cereal stays crunchy even in _____.
A detective knew the cookie was guilty because _____.
The tiny alien demanded to be taken to _____.
What is the most dramatic thing a toaster could say?
At the talent show, the goldfish surprised everyone by _____.
The least popular board game is called _____.
The haunted house was not scary until the doorbell played _____.
What should never be used as a pizza topping?
The world's smallest trophy is awarded for _____.
What would clouds complain about if they had a group chat?
The magician pulled _____ out of the hat and immediately apologized.
A fridge writing a diary would start with _____.
The king's royal decree required everyone to carry _____.
What is the worst thing to hear from a talking backpack?
The science fair volcano erupted and covered the judges in _____.
A sleepy knight names their sword _____.
Every time the door opened, the choir sang about _____.
What is a suspiciously specific fortune cookie message?
The mayor's new statue is holding _____.
What would a very dramatic houseplant demand?
The campfire story got weird when the ghost asked for _____.
The best excuse for being late to a pillow fight is _____.
The new dance move is called The _____.
What is a terrible password for a secret clubhouse?
The zoo's audio tour described the turtle as _____.
What would a snowman order at a drive-through?
The bakery's mystery donut was filled with _____.
The least useful thing to pack for a trip to space is _____.
The marching band sounded great until someone started playing _____.
What is the weirdest prize inside a cereal box?
The castle's secret room contained nothing but _____.
A very fancy duck would introduce itself as _____.
The substitute teacher wrote only one thing on the board: _____.
What is the worst sound for a doorbell to make?
The tiny parade had floats shaped like _____.
What would a sandwich say before a big race?
The library added a new quiet zone for _____.

finalPrompts.text: Invent a new holiday that would make everyone at the table laugh.
Write the title of a movie about this table's most dramatic snack.
Create a slogan for a theme park where every ride is slightly confused.
Name the award someone wins for the most unnecessary celebration.
What message should be printed on a trophy for excellent silliness?
Pitch a new sport that only uses couch cushions and confidence.
What would be the name of a restaurant run entirely by wizards?
Write the first line of a bedtime story that immediately goes off track.

randomAnswers: Tiny shoes for a giant hat
A polite sneeze in a jar
